en: You can insert a Gem into a socket. Once inserted, it cannot be removed.
zh: 你可以把宝石镶嵌到插槽中。一旦镶嵌后不能拿下。

en: Stack and process one by one when the matching stops.
zh: 堆叠起来并在匹配停止时一个接一个地处理。

en: Eliminate self when a pattern matched next to.
zh: 当旁边有图案匹配时，消除自身。

en: Loses one layer when eliminated. Disappears when all durability is depleted.
zh: 消除时减少一层。失去所有耐久后消失。

en: Effect when the this Item is placed into the board.
zh: 当此道具被放置到棋盘时的效果。

en: Effect when the this Item is placed into the board. And then the Item will return to Bag.
zh: 当此道具被放置到棋盘时的效果。之后道具会放回到包。

en: Effect other gems while this is on board.
zh: 当此道具在棋盘上时影响其它宝石。

en: For each eliminated gem, add score with that value.
zh: 每消除一个宝石，增加那个数值的分数。

en: You can drag this Item to Bag in order to exchange another item.
zh: 你可以将此道具拖拽到包来交换一个新的道具。

en: Place a satisfied Item to this Item in order to form a combine Item. Basiclly new Item have the effects of both.
zh: 将一个满足条件的道具放到此道具上来组合一个新道具。通常新道具拥有两个道具的效果。

en: Records the positions of the cells on the Board where Star rune Gems should appear. When achieved, those Gems are eliminated and trigger an effect. Additionally, the Star rune Gems on those cells gain w_floating.
zh: 记录了棋盘中应该出现有星星符文宝石的格子位置，当达成时，消除那些宝石并触发效果。另外为那些格子上的星星符文宝石提供w_floating。

en: Does not participate in matches. Will not fall when there are empty cells below. Loses 1 layer whenever a match occurs adjacent to it.
zh: 不参与匹配。不会因为底下有空的位置而下降。每次旁边有匹配发生减少1层。

en: Score and Mult getting from nullified will become 0.
zh: 从无效化中获取的分数跟倍率会变成0。

en: Will not fall when there are empty cells below.
zh: 不会因为底下有空的位置而下降。

en: Gems with Wave rune do not score.
zh: 带有波浪符文的宝石不会得分。

en: Gems with Circle rune do not score.
zh: 带有圆符文的宝石不会得分。

en: Gems with Star rune do not score.
zh: 带有星星符文的宝石不会得分。

en: Gem can have up to 2 enchantments
You can’t have less than %d gems
zh: 你不能拥有低于%d个宝石

en: You can have up to %d relics
You can’t swap gems in the mist
zh: 你不能交换迷雾中的宝石

en: You can’t swap gems that have a Sin
zh: 你不能交换拥有罪的宝石

en: Score at lease %d to earn [img width]res://images/coin.png[/img]%d.
zh: 最少达到 %d 分来获得[img width]res://images/coin.png[/img]%d。

en: The horizontal cells would be Board Size x6, the vertical cells would be Board Size x2.
zh: 横向的格子数将会是 棋盘大小 x6，纵向的格子数将会是 棋盘大小 x2。

en: Minimum number of gems required to upgrade Board Size: %d\nMinimum number of gems: %d
zh: 升级棋盘大小所需最少宝石数量：%d\n最少宝石数量：%d

en: Drop the item here to exchange another item.
zh: 把道具拖拽到这来交换另一个道具。

en: Use 1 Swaps to shuffle the Board.
zh: 使用1次交换次数洗牌棋盘。

en: Roll the board, unpinned and unfrozen gems will be replaced to new ones, then draw new items.
zh: 滚动棋盘，未固定跟未冰冻的宝石会被替换成新的，然后抽取新的道具。

en: Start matching patterns and get score.
How many fillings were performed during this matching stage.\nStops matching stage when reaching 40.
zh: 在这次匹配阶段进行过多少次填充。达到40时停止匹配阶段。

en: - Drag a gem from [color=cyan]Hand[/color] to [color=cyan]Board[/color] to swap them. (You start with 5 [color=cyan]Swaps[/color] per round)\n - Click the [color=cyan]Play button[/color] to match [color=cyan]Patterns[/color] and score.\n - You pass the round when you reach the target score. When you use up all the [color=cyan]Swaps[/color] but don’t reach the target score, you lose the game.
zh: - 从[color=cyan]手上[/color]拖拽一个宝石到[color=cyan]棋盘[/color]上来交换。（一开始你每回合有5次[color=cyan]交换次数[/color]）\n – 点击[color=cyan]开始按钮[/color]来开始匹配[color=cyan]图案[/color]并得分。\n – 当你达到目标分数时，你通过回合。当你用完所有的[color=cyan]交换次数[/color]却没有达到目标分数，你游戏失败。

en: - Gems come with 5 colors[url=gem_red][img]res://images/red.png[/img][/url][url=gem_orange][img]res://images/orange.png[/img][/url][url=gem_green][img]res://images/green.png[/img][/url][url=gem_blue][img]res://images/blue.png[/img][/url][url=gem_magenta][img]res://images/magenta.png[/img][/url], also [/url][url=w_wild][img]res://images/wild.png[/img][/url].\n - Gems can have 3 types of runes[url=rune_wave][img]res://images/rune_wave.png[/img][/url][url=rune_circle][img]res://images/rune_circle.png[/img][/url][url=rune_star][img]res://images/rune_star.png[/img][/url], also[url=w_omni][img]res://images/rune_omni.png[/img][/url].\n – Here are some [color=cyan]Patterns[/color]. They will have specific color or rune requirements.
zh: - 宝石有5种颜色[url=gem_red][img]res://images/red.png[/img][/url][url=gem_orange][img]res://images/orange.png[/img][/url][url=gem_green][img]res://images/green.png[/img][/url][url=gem_blue][img]res://images/blue.png[/img][/url][url=gem_magenta][img]res://images/magenta.png[/img][/url]，还有[url=w_wild][img]res://images/wild.png[/img][/url]。\n – 宝石有3种符文[url=rune_wave][img]res://images/rune_wave.png[/img][/url][url=rune_circle][img]res://images/rune_circle.png[/img][/url][url=rune_star][img]res://images/rune_star.png[/img][/url]，还有[url=w_omni][img]res://images/rune_omni.png[/img][/url]。\n – 以下是一些[color=cyan]图案[/color]。它们会有特定的颜色或者符文需求。
消除：红色宝石的基础分数+[n_{value_i}]。
消除：橙色宝石的基础分数+[n_{value_i}]。
消除：绿色宝石的基础分数+[n_{value_i}]。
消除：蓝色宝石的基础分数+[n_{value_i}]。
消除：紫色宝石的基础分数+[n_{value_i}]。

en: w_quick: Pin the cell and if it is on one or more patterns, pin those cells as well.
zh: w_quick：固定格子并且如果在一个或多个图案中，把那些格子也固定。

en: Eliminate: (w_active) Explode and eliminate cells within [n_{range_i}]-ring.
zh: 消除：(w_active) 爆炸并消除[n_{range_i}]环内的格子。

en: Eliminate by [b]Bomb[/b]: (w_active) Explode and eliminate cells within [n_{range_i}]-ring.
zh: 被炸弹消除：(w_active) 爆炸并消除[n_{range_i}]环内的格子。

en: Eliminate: (w_active) Explode and eliminate cells within [n_{range_i}]-ring.\n(If eliminated after 'Chain Bomb', range become that 'Chain Bomb's +1, and w_power become that 'Chain Bomb's +2.)
Eliminate: (w_active) Cost 6 coins to explode and eliminate cells within [n_{range_i}]-ring, earn 0-3 coins for each cell eliminated.

w_quick: Setup a minefield within within [n_{setup_range_i}]-ring, and if any cell in that area is eliminated, (w_active)an explosion will occur on that cell and eliminate cells within [n_{range_i}]-ring.
zh: w_quick：在[n_{setup_range_i}]环设置地雷阵，如果区域内的格子被消除，(w_active)一个爆炸将会在那个格子发生并消除[n_{range_i}]环内的格子。

en: When an explosion occurs: (w_active) Eliminate 1 random adjacent cell.\nEliminate by [b]Bomb[/b]: (w_active) Eliminate cells within [n_{range_i}]-ring.
w_place: Make two copies of this Item into adjacent cells.\nEliminate: (w_active) Eliminate all connected cells with the same color of this.
Eliminate: (w_active) Connect all 'Lightning's, eliminate cells on between.
zh: 消除：(w_active) 连接所有的’闪电’，消除它们之间的格子。
消除：红色宝石的基础分数+{value_i}。
消除：橙色宝石的基础分数+{value_i}。
消除：绿色宝石的基础分数+{value_i}。
消除：蓝色宝石的基础分数+{value_i}。
消除：品红色宝石的基础分数+{value_i}。

en: Eliminate: (w_active) Turn a adjacent Gem to orange color.
zh: 消除：(w_active)把1个附近的宝石变成橙色。

en: Eliminate: 1 random color gems' base score +{add_value_i}.
zh: 消除：1个随机颜色宝石的基础分数+{add_value_i}。

en: [c_{bait_i}]With bait\nEliminate: (w_active) Fishing at a adjacent gem with Wave rune. If success, score 100x its weight.
zh: [c_{bait_i}]带有鱼饵\n消除：(w_active)在附近的一个带有海浪符文的宝石上钓鱼。如果成功，获得100x它的重量的分数。
重量：[n10_{weight_i}]KG。\n消除：获得100x重量的分数。
重量：[n10_{weight_i}]KG。\n消除：获得100x重量的分数。
重量：[n10_{weight_i}]KG。\n消除：获得100x重量的分数。
重量：[n10_{weight_i}]KG。\n消除：获得100x重量的分数。
重量：[n10_{weight_i}]KG。\n消除：获得100x重量的分数。

en: Eliminate: Sets the cell to burning state.
Eliminate: (w_active) If this is the last item activated. Eliminate all cells.
Eliminate: (w_active) Eliminate all cells. (Only activate if this is the first item activated.)
Eliminate: +{value_i} score for each different Item.
zh: 消除：棋盘上每有一个不同的道具则+{value_i}分数。

en: Eliminate: (w_active) Jump to a cell and eliminate it within [n_2]-ring. Repeat 2 times.
zh: 消除：(w_active) 跳到一个[n_2]环内的格子并消除它。重复2次。

en: Eliminate: (w_active) Jump to a cell and eliminate it within [n_2]-ring. If jump to another 'Rabbit', add a new 'Rabbit' to Bag. Repeat 1 time.
w_place: If this item is placed from Bag, place another [color=gray][b]Animal[/b][/color] from Bag to Board.
w_place: Place another [color=gray][b]Animal[/b][/color] from Bag to Board.
Eliminate: (w_active) Consume a [color=gray][b]Food[/b][/color] on the board, gain score it has.
Turn mounted and this Item into a new Item.
Eliminate all cells this item traveled.
Eliminate by other than ‘Blade’: (w_active) Eliminate a row on a random direction.
zh: 被‘刀刃’之外消除：(w_active) 消除随机方向的1行。

en: When an item is activated, move it to the closest 'Magnet'.
Eliminate: x{value_i}% score gain until the end of this matching.
zh: 消除：直到这次匹配结束前，x{value_i}%分数获取。

en: w_aura: Gems within [n_{range_i}]-ring +{value_i} score.\nEliminate: (w_active) Gems in [n_1]-ring -1 base score.
zh: w_aura：[n_{range_i}]环内的宝石+{value_i}分数。\n消除：（w_active）[n_1]环内的宝石基础分数-1。

en: Eliminate: (w_active) Turn {number} random gems to w_wild temporarily.
zh: 消除：(w_active) 使{number}个随机的宝石临时地变为w_wild。

en: w_aura: Gems within [n_{range_i}]-ring +7 score.\nEliminate: (w_active) Gems in [n_1]-ring get +1 score permanently.
Eliminate: (w_active) Turn gems within [n_1]-ring to Wild until the end of level.
w_quick: Target Item +10 w_power until the end of level.
zh: w_quick：使目标道具直到关卡结束前获得+10w_power。

en: w_aura: The repeat number of gems within [n_{range_i}]-ring +1.
Eliminate: (w_active) Eliminate 2 random cells within [n_2]-ring. Repeat 2 times.
zh: 消除：(w_active)消除[n_2]环内的2个随机格子。重复2次。

en: At the end of each round and this Item is in the bag: If a Gem did not leave the Bag during that round, its Base Score +1.
zh: 在每回合结束时并且此物品在背包中时：若1个宝石在那一回合没有离开背包，它的基础分数+1。

en: Composition with Red, Blue and Yellow

zh: 品红色宝石的基础分数+{value_i}。

en: '+{value_i} score when eliminate a gem with Wave rune.
zh: 消除带有海浪符文的宝石时+{value_i} 分数。

en: '+{value_i} score when eliminate a gem with Circle rune.
zh: 消除带有圆符文的宝石时+{value_i} 分数。

en: '+{value_i} score when eliminate a gem with Star rune.
zh: 消除带有星星符文的宝石时+{value_i} 分数。

en: Bombs will activate when cells next to are eliminated.
zh: 当旁边的格子被消除时，炸弹会被激活。

en: The upper and lower parts of the Board are connected.
zh: 棋盘的上下部分相互链接。

en: Every 5 Chains, gets x{value_f} score mult in that chain.
zh: 每5个连锁，那次连锁获得x{value_f}分数倍率。

en: Your active effects will trigger twice.
zh: 你的激活效果会触发两次。

en: Your repeat effects have a 50% chance of not consuming a repeat time.
zh: 你的重复效果有50%的几率不消耗次数。

en: The price of purchasing gems and relics is halved.
zh: 购买宝石与遗物的价格减半。

en: When [const_Gemini]: (w_active) Duplicate the left most gem from Hand.
zh: 当[const_Gemini]时：(w_active) 复制手中最左边的宝石。

en: When [const_Scorpio]: (w_active) Delete the right most gem from Hand.
zh: 当[const_Scorpius]时：(w_active) 删除手中最右边的宝石。
当[const_Sagittarius]时： (w_active) 消除1个最有价值的宝石。

en: When [const_Aquarius]: (w_active) Select 1 random gem, its Base Score +{value_i}.
zh: 当[const_Aquarius]时：(w_active) 选择1个随机宝石，它的基础分数+{value_i}。

en: When [const_Pisces]: (w_active) Turn 2 random gems into w_wild temporarily.
zh: 当[const_Aries]时：(w_active) 使2个随机宝石临时地变为w_wild。

en: Each socked Gem increase the base score of its color by 9.
zh: 每个镶嵌的宝石会使那个颜色的基础分数提高9。

en: [H:M V:75%]A mysterious journey lies ahead.\nEarn enough score to reach the next destination.
zh: [H:M V:75%]一场神秘的旅程正等待着你。\n获得足够的分数以抵达下一个目的地。

en: [H:M V:75%]To earn score, you need to complete the Patterns shown on the right.\nBrowse the Patterns you own.[T:PtternsBar]FOCUS[T:Pattern1]HOVER[T:Pattern2]HOVER[T:Pattern3]HOVER
zh: [H:M V:75%]想要得分，你需要拼凑出右侧的图案。\n浏览你拥有的图案。[T:PatternsBar]FOCUS[T:Pattern1]HOVER[T:Pattern2]HOVER[T:Pattern3]HOVER
[]RESET_MASKS[H:M V:75%]要完成图案，你可以从下方把手上的宝石拖拽到棋盘合适的位置上。
[H:M V:75%]从下方拖拽宝石，尝试构成图案。[PX:475 PY:278 SX:1010 SY:762]FOCUS[T:Hand]ENABLE[]SWAP
[H:M V:75%]你选择了一个错误的目标。\n点击撤销按钮回到原先的状态。[T:Undo]ENABLE[T:Undo]CLICK
[H:M V:75%]很好。\n点击播放按钮开始消除宝石并得分。[T:Play]ENABLE[T:Play]CLICK
[H:M V:75%]你可以多次使用播放，但是交换次数用完后进行播放将结算最后的分数。
[H:M V:75%]记住，同一个宝石匹配到多个图案时，只会计算一次分数。
[H:M V:75%]连锁可以使获得分数的倍率提高。\n在宝石消除后，下落的宝石再次构成图案，则称为连锁。
[H:M V:75%]在两次交换中尝试连锁。[T:Hand]ENABLE[N:2]SWAP
[H:M V:75%]你选择了一个错误的目标。\n点击撤销按钮回到原先的状态。[T:Undo]ENABLE[T:Undo]CLICK
[H:M V:75%]连锁是你获得高分的主要技巧，记得多多使用。
[H:M V:75%]当你对棋盘不满意时，可以消耗一次交换次数来进行刷新。\n点击刷新按钮。[T:Shuffle]ENABLE[T:Shuffle]CLICK
